summary: Tested 3 new features: Dashboard 'Total Eventos' stat card, default client name 'Desconocido', and auto-fill anticipo=total when status=Completado. All 6 test cases passed.

test_results.1_total_eventos_label: PASS - Stats card shows 'TOTAL EVENTOS' (not 'PAGO PENDIENTE'), value = Q91,444 (sum of active events)
test_results.3_auto_fill_advance: PASS - Setting total=15000 then status=Completado auto-fills advance=15000
test_results.4_advance_not_cleared: PASS - Changing back to Pendiente keeps advance=15000 (not cleared)
test_results.5_empty_total_no_change: PASS - When total is empty and status=Completado, advance stays at previous value (5000)
test_results.6_reservation_created: PASS - Reservation 'Desconocido', status=Completado, total=5000 created successfully, shows in dashboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: (1) Dashboard 3rd stat = 'TOTAL EVENTOS' showing sum of active event totals; (2) New reservation form defaults client_name='Desconocido'; (3) setStatus handler auto-fills advance_paid=total_amount when Completado selected, leaves advance unchanged when switching back to other statuses.
